node.statement: COMPUTATION C1 (Fock space enumeration): Enumerate all C(2S+1,N) ways to place N fermions in 2S+1 orbitals. Represent each state as bit-string (UInt64/UInt128). Total L_z = sum of occupied m-values. Restrict to L_z=0 sector (ground state lives here by rotational invariance). Dimensions: nu=1/3, N=8: ~9000; N=10: ~100,000. JULIA: hilbert_space.jl enumerates these. [P04-Fano Sec IV; CLAUDE_fqhe.md dimension table]
